title: sass-lint@1.9.0 breaks build ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [sass-lint](https://www.npmjs.com/package/sass-lint) just published its new version 1.9.0.
State Failing tests :warning:
Dependency sass-lint
New version 1.9.0
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build kept failing**. **It looks like your project, in its current form, is malfunctioning** and this update didn’t really change that. I don’t want to leave you in the dark about updates though. I recommend you get your project passing and then check the impact of this update again. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/releases/tag/v1.9.0)

v1.9.0

August 18, 2016

Fixes

  • Fixed an issue with the indentation rule when it encountered at-rules with no block immediately preceding a map #779 #783
  • Fixed an issue in single-lint-per-selector where inline comments were seen as selectors #789
  • Fixed an issue with interpolation in placeholders within the bem-depth rule #782
  • Removed duplicated code from no-mergeable-selectors to helper methods

Documentation

  • Fixed typos in no-vendor-prefixes rule documentation #787
  • Added link to Visual Studio extension #815

New Rules

  • Added the no-color-hex rule to disallow all hexadecimal colour definitions #754

Updates

  • Gonzales-pe updated to version 3.4.4 which fixes a lot of longstanding issues see the Changelog
--- The new version differs by 50 commits . - [`38d43ad`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/38d43ad0a942b5c70a4360f128d464aceb636e43) Merge pull request #829 from sasstools/release/1.9.0 - [`9db9bea`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/9db9beaedcfb6fae4e4051b2fe6e4f391c32ef56) Prepare 1.9.0 - [`052dcd1`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/052dcd111b8da46c109d59d2338626e2a64cd473) Merge pull request #823 from DanPurdy/feature/tidy-mergeable-selectors - [`dc2d59d`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/dc2d59df7443f5e85017cf31176c2c98842ecb43) Merge branch 'develop' into feature/tidy-mergeable-selectors - [`91dfe0b`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/91dfe0b127ac99b14e6c827690a458ae7abf115f) Merge pull request #754 from DanPurdy/feature/no-color-hex - [`831caa2`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/831caa269294526c45eb83fd9d36b32751b8c2b7) Merge branch 'develop' into feature/no-color-hex - [`2f0407a`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/2f0407a087f6b52fcc1ce620f975308a1abfa113) Merge pull request #818 from DanPurdy/feature/update-bem-depth - [`a0e8496`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/a0e8496b78aba33b1ccdeb6f76947769a9bcf1f8) Merge branch 'develop' into feature/update-bem-depth - [`7542078`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/75420782b116ccd59f1c31c0041a0c3172b64342) Merge branch 'develop' into feature/no-color-hex - [`fcc92a7`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/fcc92a7b2360d4c86c8c0db4755123f71060aac8) Merge branch 'develop' into feature/no-color-hex - [`e43b349`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/e43b349ab65abc7bd70e9bee417bc3748a52c931) :art: Remove duplicate functions - [`654bf72`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/654bf72e573c85f7a8638e1980066fbefbd6764b) :white_check_mark: Add constructSelector tests - [`22c7c32`](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/commit/22c7c321b259f5ddfef0810ac7c3a23892d7cf49) :bug: Fix interpolation in placeholders - bem depth There are 50 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/sasstools/sass-lint/compare/9ee2b856ed479915f0f6d881af891eb4f5e207ce...38d43ad0a942b5c70a4360f128d464aceb636e43). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
